Roof Restoration Narre Warren North

Sandhurst Roofing only employs experienced and knowledgeable roofers, who are highly skilled in working with a large variety of roofing materials and roof types. This means we will be happy to work with you on your next roofing project, no matter what it is.

With over 30 years’ experience, we are becoming one of Melbourne's leading and most trusted family-owned and operated businesses. We guide you through every part of the project and take the time to make sure that all your requirements are met.

Get a Free Quote!

Narre Warren North Roof Repairs

Our team provides high-quality workmanship and excellent customer service to all our customers. We deliver everything from full roof restorations and repairs to gutter installation and more to residents of Narre Warren North.

We're licensed to handle all your roofing needs. Whether you need gutter repairs,  re-roofing or a roof restoration, all our services are fully insured. This provides you with peace of mind, knowing that your roof restoration or repairs will be finished to the highest standard by our registered roof plumbers and roof tilers.

We provide Narre Warren North residents with an informative service and are more than happy to organise an on-site quote.

Get a Free Quote!

Narre Warren North Gutter Repairs

The repair or replacement of your gutters is essential in keeping your property waterproof, as well as maintaining the curbside appeal of your home. Gutters carry water away from the house, preventing leaks, mould growth, and the rotting of important roof structures.

At Sandhurst Roofing, we only trust the best quality brands and products; that’s why we use Colorbond Steel for all our guttering jobs. COLORBOND® steel is one of the most durable, reliable and versatile materials; not only will it last for years, but there is such a wide range of colours, we are confident we will find a colour that matches the existing exterior of any home.

We understand how important both the aesthetic and functionality of your property are, which is why we offer our comprehensive roofing and guttering services to the people of Narre Warren North.

For all your guttering solutions call the team at Sandhurst Roofing today on 0448 812 800. Our staff will be more than happy to talk you through our processes, or to answer any questions you may have.

What Our Customers Say

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Contact The Roof Restoration Experts Narre Warren North

Are you ready to get your next roofing project underway? Call Steve today on 0448 812 800 for a quote or email us at info@sandhurstroofing.com.au. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
